sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try moving the light green square to different positions
# Currently at middle-center [40:41, 10:11]
# Try DOWN, RIGHT to get to bottom-right [42:43, 12:13]

predict(expect_change=True, note='Move light green DOWN, RIGHT to bottom-right')
action(['DOWN', 'RIGHT'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        r0, r1 = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
        c0, c1 = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Light green: [{r0}:{r1},{c0}:{c1}]")

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
